question: Is the image a realistic photography of an auto repair workshop taken from a front-side angle view?
Is the lighting consistent with cool white work lights?
Is there exactly one red sedan positioned in the center of the frame?
Is the sedan lifted on a blue hydraulic lift with the front wheel position suspended in the air?
Does the car body appear dusty?
Is there exactly one black oil drain pan placed directly under the engine?
Does the liquid inside the oil drain pan show bright green reflections?
Are there exactly two funnels (one orange plastic, one transparent glass) arranged side by side to the right of the oil drain pan?
Is the orange funnel tilted slightly to the left?
Are there exactly six black tires arranged in a fan-shaped formation against the right wall?
Are the tire tread patterns clear and is the foremost tire's upper edge higher than the others?
Are there exactly two brake discs placed side by side on the ground to the front left of the tires?
Is the left brake disc regular silver metal and the right brake disc light purple?
Is there exactly one open red toolbox in the left-center area with the lid flipped back?
Are there exactly four wrenches arranged on the ground in front of the toolbox?
Is the wrench sequence from left to right: 2 long-handle open-end, 1 ratchet socket, 1 short-handle box-end?
Do all the metal wrench heads face to the right?
Are there exactly two cordless drills in the lower left, with the left one black matte and the right one dark gray?
Are both drill bits pointing to the right?
Is there exactly one black air hose coiled in a large circle in the center-right area?
Does the air hose's metal connector face toward the front of the frame with a visible highlight?
Are there exactly two work lamps on tripod stands in the right rear?
Is there exactly one pair of transparent safety goggles resting lens-side up on the workbench in the left rear?
Are there exactly two pairs of fluorescent pink gloves next to the goggles with fingers pointing left?
Are there exactly two dark gray oil-stained rags on the ground in front of the gloves?
Are the rags positioned one in front and one behind?
Are there exactly two black jack stands standing upright, stable, and parallel in the center-bottom?
Is there exactly one bright blue fire extinguisher mounted on the left wall?
Does the metal nozzle of the fire extinguisher face to the right?
Is the image clear, free from severe artifacts, and are objects free from severe physical distortions?
